title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that enables research agents to access frontier models and over 30 scientific databases like UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It orchestrates multi-step research workflows to accelerate hypothesis-to-experiment timelines, demonstrated through genetic variant investigation in the AK2 gene.
